name: Terradome
author: Poki
description: Terradome is an idle game where you bring life to a barren planet—starting from inside your tiny dome! Collect oxygen and resources, use your gun to grind materials, and expand your dome to make room for new life. But be careful—strange lifeforms may appear inside! Upgrade your speed, dome stretch rate, and planetary systems to grow your world faster. Can you transform this dead planet into a thriving paradise? How to play Terradome? Use the joystick or WASD or the arrow keys to move. Who created Terradome? Terradome is created by Udo. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Terradome for free? You can play Terradome for free on Poki. Can I play Terradome on mobile devices and desktop? Terradome can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
